item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-14 - Today's Summary
item.description: The dominant pattern today is the explosive breakout of Agent Reach, a CLI tool that gives AI agents free access to Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, and more. Its 5x acceleration and 6,080 weekly stars suggest strong developer appetite for reducing API costs in agent tool-calling. Meanwhile, Headroom's sustained hot streak (12,476 stars in 7 days) confirms token compression is a parallel priority. The MCP/Tool Calling category shows the highest average weekly delta (3,328), while Coding Agent/SWE Agent leads in daily velocity (4,486 avg). The absence of new Product Hunt launches in AI suggests attention is concentrated on GitHub projects rather than product debuts. If this trajectory holds, expect more open-source tool-calling and cost-optimization projects to emerge in the coming days. Top projects: iptv-org/iptv, swc-project/swc, Panniantong/Agent-Reach, chopratejas/headroom, addyosmani/agent-skills, rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch, esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix, nexu-io/open-design, HKUDS/nanobot, sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills, tirth8205/code-review-graph, affaan-m/ECC Note: GitHub API 只提供当前 stars，总量变化来自本项目保存的历史 snapshot。 Note: daily delta 使用约 24h 前 snapshot，weekly delta 使用约 7 天前 snapshot。 Note: Accelerating 只展示至少 3 天历史基线且今日 delta 超过前 3 日均值 2 倍的项目。 Note: Potential Score 为规则评分，用于排序，不代表项目质量结论。 Note: Multi-source warning: arXiv collection failed: This operation was aborted

item.title: [sustained_hot] iptv-org/iptv (+2044 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: A massive, community-maintained collection of publicly available IPTV channel playlists from around the world. Why it matters: With 119,895 stars and a 24-hour star delta of 1,785, this project is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is low (1), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. It remains one of the most-starred repositories on GitHub, consistently attracting thousands of new stars daily. Developer insight: For AI developers, this project highlights the value of structured, open data for training models related to media classification, content discovery, or recommendation systems. The curated channel database could serve as a training resource. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] swc-project/swc (+195 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: SWC is a super-fast Rust-based compiler for JavaScript and TypeScript, designed to replace Babel and speed up web development. Why it matters: With 33,716 stars and a 24-hour delta of +177, SWC shows sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is low (1), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. This is a mature, widely-adopted tool that continues to gain traction as more developers seek faster build pipelines. Developer insight: For AI developers, SWC's Rust core demonstrates how systems-level languages can accelerate developer tooling. This trend may extend to other AI tooling where performance is critical. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+1561 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Agent Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI coding agents zero-friction access to read and search across Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and more — without any API fees. Why it matters: With 26,660 stars and a 7-day average of 800 new stars per day, Agent Reach is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The 24-hour delta of 597 and acceleration of 0.7 indicate a steady, organic surge — not a one-day spike. This momentum suggests broad, ongoing adoption among AI developers who need their agents to interact with the open web. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward 'agent infrastructure' as a new category: tools that abstract away platform-specific barriers (API costs, login requirements, anti-bot measures) so agents can operate freely. The sustained star growth indicates strong product-market fit and a clear demand for open-source, community-maintained alternatives to paid data APIs. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] chopratejas/headroom (+12476 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Headroom compresses tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks by 60–95% before they reach the LLM, preserving answer quality while slashing token costs. Why it matters: With 26,586 stars and a 24-hour delta of 11,923, Headroom is experiencing explosive growth. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), indicating sustained hot momentum rather than a sudden spike. This level of attention signals a massive unmet need for token optimization in the AI agent ecosystem. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward 'context engineering' as a first-class concern in AI development. Tools that optimize token usage without degrading quality will become essential infrastructure, much like caching layers for databases. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] addyosmani/agent-skills (+2154 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A curated pack of 24 production-grade engineering skills packaged as Markdown workflows for AI coding agents, covering the full development lifecycle from spec to ship. Why it matters: The repo is experiencing explosive growth with 58,952 stars, a 24-hour delta of 1,919, and a 7-day delta of 10,228. The three-day average star delta is 2,396.7, and the acceleration ratio is 0.8 (high but not sudden breakout). This sustained hot trend reflects massive developer interest in standardizing AI agent behavior for production code. Developer insight: The rapid adoption signals a shift: developers are moving from 'prompting agents' to 'governing agents' with structured workflows. This repo is a blueprint for how agent behavior can be standardized, and it may influence how future AI coding tools design their skill systems. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch (+544 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A massive, free, open-source curriculum (503 lessons, 20 phases) that teaches AI engineering from math foundations to production-grade agents, with every lesson producing a reusable artifact. Why it matters: With 31,756 stars, a 24-hour delta of +319, and a 7-day average of +421.6, this repo is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 0.9 (high) indicates strong organic momentum without a sudden spike, suggesting broad, steady adoption. The project's claim of 150,639 readers and 241,669 page views in the last 30 days further confirms real-world traction. Developer insight: The project signals a shift in how AI education is consumed: developers want hands-on, code-first, artifact-producing curricula that integrate with their existing tools (Claude, Cursor, etc.). The emphasis on MCP servers and agent skills points to a growing ecosystem around agentic workflows. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix (+367 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for the terminal, rewritten in Go for prefix-cache stability and low token costs. Why it matters: With 21,973 stars, a 24-hour delta of +367, and a 7-day average of +436 stars/day, this project shows sustained high velocity. The acceleration of 0.9 indicates steady, organic growth rather than a sudden spike. It's ranked top 2 in Agents and top 3 in CLI by velocity on OOSMetrics, signaling strong community traction. Developer insight: The focus on prefix-cache optimization signals a growing trend: as LLM usage scales, cost efficiency and session persistence become critical. This project shows that specialized agents for specific model families can outperform generic tools. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] nexu-io/open-design (+614 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Open Design is a local-first, open-source alternative to Claude Design that turns your laptop into an agent-native design studio, generating prototypes, decks, images, and videos from a single design system via any coding agent CLI. Why it matters: With 64,655 stars, a 24-hour delta of +614, and a 7-day average of +647 stars/day, Open Design is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.1 indicates steady momentum rather than a sudden spike, suggesting deep organic adoption. The recent 0.10.0 release (all-in-one agentic workspace) and the launch of the AMR model router likely fuel continued interest. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward agent-native design workflows where the design system is a first-class code artifact. For AI developers, Open Design shows how to build extensible, local-first tools that leverage the ecosystem of coding agents rather than competing with them. The BYOK proxy and MCP architecture are patterns worth studying for building interoperable AI tools. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] HKUDS/nanobot (+65 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: An ultra-lightweight, open-source personal AI agent that you can truly own, with WebUI, chat channels, tools, memory, MCP, model routing, automation, and deployment. Why it matters: With 44,189 stars, a 7-day average delta of 54.4 stars/day, and a 24h delta of 65, the project shows strong, sustained growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.2 indicates steady momentum rather than a sudden spike, making it a reliable choice for developers seeking a mature, actively maintained agent framework. Developer insight: The rapid iteration and broad provider support signal a shift toward modular, multi-model agent frameworks that prioritize user ownership and local deployment over cloud-dependent solutions. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills (+154 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: An installable library of 1,550+ reusable SKILL.md playbooks for AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Cursor, and Gemini CLI. Why it matters: With 40,690 stars, a 24h delta of +154, and a 7-day delta of +776, the project shows sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio of 1.3 indicates steady growth without a sudden spike, suggesting broad, ongoing adoption rather than a viral event. Developer insight: The rise of skill libraries signals a shift from ad-hoc prompting to curated, reusable agent instructions. This could become a standard layer in AI-assisted development, similar to how package managers transformed code reuse. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] tirth8205/code-review-graph (+36 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向一周增长 +339，属于持续升温信号。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] affaan-m/ECC (+886 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +886，总 stars 215,288，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low
